allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(day09\): add multi-query retrieval to fix gq08 partial → full

gq08 asked about both "nghỉ phép năm" \(annual leave 3-day notice\) and
"nghỉ ốm" \(sick leave 3-day medical docs\). The critical procedure chunk
was at retrieval position 11 \(score 0.5395\), unreachable with top_k=5.

Added _extract_sub_queries\(\) in retrieval.py that detects multi-topic
HR leave questions and generates focused sub-queries, merging results
with deduplication. gq08 confidence: 0.30 → 0.76. No regression on
gq07 \(abstain preserved\) or gq09.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
